# PERF-188 negative: strconv.ParseInt replaces fmt.Sscanf
lang: go
file: PERF-188-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	raw := r.URL.Query().Get("n")
	n, _ := strconv.ParseInt(raw, 10, 64)
	w.WriteHeader(200)
	_ = n
}
